## Validation

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run coverage`
- [ ] `cd example && bun run start` (when framework/runtime behavior changed)

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] Package README updated if package-level API changed
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated if project conventions or workflow changed
- [ ] `TODO.md` / `docs/roadmap.md` updated if scope or direction changed
- [ ] Decision record added/updated in `docs/decisions/` if architecture changed

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes are described below

If this is a breaking change, explain:

- what changed
- why it changed
- what users need to update

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
